title: Future directions in preclinical and translational cancer neuroscience research.
authors: Neural Influences in Cancer (NIC) International Research Consortium
author_string: Demir, Ihsan Ekin, Mota Reyes, Carmen, Alrawashdeh, Wasfi, Ceyhan, Güralp O, Deborde, Sylvie et al.
abstract: Recent advances in cancer neuroscience necessitate the systematic analysis of neural influences in cancer as potential therapeutic targets in oncology. Here, we outline recommendations for future preclinical and translational research in this field.
